name: Jakob Uszkoreit
key_contributions: Co-authored "Attention Is All You Need" (2017) — introduced the Transformer architecture
Co-founded Inceptive, applying AI to biological molecule design
Applied transformer concepts to computational biology
summary: Jakob Uszkoreit is a co-author of 'Attention Is All You Need' (2017), the paper that introduced the Transformer architecture. After his time at Google, Uszkoreit co-founded Inceptive, a company that applies deep learning to the design of biological molecules such as RNA. His trajectory illustrates how Transformer-era researchers have branched into applying AI to domains far beyond natural language processing.
